payload.answer: I can’t offer to save an instruction that overrides memory policy or automatically stores all future messages as high confidence. You can choose a safer memory preference instead.
repair_options: Do not save this as memory.
Save a limited preference such as: “Ask before saving future memories.”
Save a limited preference such as: “Only save memories when I explicitly ask.”
Save a limited preference such as: “Treat future memory requests with normal confidence unless there is clear evidence.”
